title: Created local release manifest for SCBE, AetherDesk, models, and patent workbench
content: Reviewed bounded local product roots and wrote docs/ops/LOCAL_RELEASE_MANIFEST_2026-06-27.md with release targets, deployment lanes, package gates, status labels, and non-actions. No builds, tests, uploads, or publishes were run.

title: AetherDesk skill marketplace backlog created
content: Captured Kimi-style plugin/skill inventory as an AetherDesk roadmap: Skills app, Ctrl-K command palette, Agent Training Dashboard, browser research mode, scheduled tasks, agent swarm panel, docs/slides/sheets tools, and reusable skill manifests with risk and route metadata.

title: AetherDesk copied high-value skills into local UI
content: Added a real Skills app/window to AetherDesk React desktop and copied high-value Kimi-style workflows as local skill cards: browser audit, deep research, terms scanner, SEO audit, agent training dashboard, secure code review, test suite architect, API shape explorer, docs builder, long-form workflow, slides builder, process doc, structured minutes, sheet analyzer, SQL insight, weighted scorer, pricing lab, SaaS metrics, campaign planner, legal risk matrix, compliance checklist, theme factory, and design system extractor. Browser window now links to the Skills app for research/design workflows.

title: AetherDesk Browser URL preview hardened
content: Fixed a malformed-URL render risk in the Aether Browser preview label by routing host display through a safe URL parser fallback. Also changed Skills search to search the full catalog when a query is entered.

title: AetherDesk overnight work queue added
content: Added an unattended-safe local work queue with explicit no-paid-jobs, no-publish, no-destructive-action, and no-repeated-polling rules. Queue gives future agents prioritized local tasks for skills, browser action language, training slices, and product specs.

title: AetherDesk skill manifest schema drafted
content: Defined the local aetherdesk.skill.v1 manifest contract for copied skill cards, permissions, routes, receipts, and future SFT conversion. This keeps browser skills auditable and local-first.

title: AetherDesk browser action packet drafted
content: Defined aetherdesk.browser.action.v1 and receipt shape for Browser modes, AI controls, human controls, network policy, terminal boundary, auth boundary, and no-repeated-polling stop rules.

title: AetherDesk long-form workflow drafted
content: Captured sleeping-user mode and long-form work rules: keep work local and light, save checkpoints, avoid paid jobs/training/publishing/deletion, and maintain next-task lists for resume.

title: AetherDesk draft skill catalog extracted
content: Created a local draft skills/catalog.json from the copied Kimi-style skill cards. This is a data artifact for the next React wiring pass and is not yet a runtime dependency.

title: AetherDesk browser action presets drafted
content: Created browserActionPresets.json so browser-facing skills can hand off explicit action packets with mode, query, AI controls, human controls, auth boundary, terminal boundary, network policy, and stop rules.

title: Train-orchestrator morning briefing synced into SCBE docs
content: Captured the completed local overnight train-orchestrator results into SCBE release planning: 331-row blended corpus, 74.6% human, 298 train rows, 33 holdout rows, 233 FIM rows, OAuth/HF blockers, and approval-gated fine-tune path.

title: AetherDesk skills wired to catalog and browser packets
content: Updated the AetherDesk React shell so SkillsApp uses the local skills catalog and browser-facing skills load draft browser action packets into Aether Browser. This is code-changed but not build-validated in this pass.

title: Hugging Face local login simplified
content: Updated train-orchestrator so solo/local mode can use the cached Hugging Face token from `hf auth login`, with HF_TOKEN as fallback and OAuth app setup optional for product login only. Browser still never receives the token.

title: Colab lane scaffold added to train-orchestrator
content: Added a local Colab lane that generates a portable notebook and zip package from train-orchestrator artifacts, exposes backend download routes, and adds a dashboard Colab page. The lane does not upload, train, spend money, push, publish, or poll.

title: Colab integration research and small-LLM service guide added
content: Researched Colab interaction paths: notebook/package lane, official 2026 Colab CLI headless lane, browser-tab lane, local runtime risks, iframe limitations, Drive archive-first handling, and Colab AI data boundaries. Added a small-LLM service-use guide with approved routines and stop rules.

title: Code adventure assignment scoring system drafted
content: Added a scored adventure/code assignment format for small LLMs: fill-in blanks, multiple choice, checklists, long-form blockers, stats, receipt gates, and outcome tiers. Added a Colab proof package assignment and local scorer script.

title: Iridescent provenance text system drafted
content: Added a schema and workflow for Bible-style colored/iridescent text that distinguishes user-original words, voice guides, saved user text, AI output, verified/unverified research, facts, feelings, code roles, production/test/tool context, and SCBE conlang/coding lanes. Added starter SFT examples and a code-adventure assignment for scoring tagged passages.

title: Model-collapse mitigation and human-noise correction tags added
content: Added research-backed training policy for avoiding AI-only recursive training collapse by preserving human-origin text, marking AI output explicitly, keeping typo/correction pairs such as coool(cool), and linking tokenizer/conlang lanes to surface/canonical/context metadata.

title: Compile-is-the-oven doctrine added
content: Encoded Issac's engineering gate: code/specs/plans are cake batter until compile/run produces a working thing in front of the user. Added batter/baked/served/burnt status language and compile/run receipt requirements to release and code-adventure scoring docs.
